steps.name: There is TeamOwnerA with team Bots
TeamOwnerA adds Member1 and Member2 to team Bots with role Member
There is TeamOwnerB with team ConnectedFriend
TeamOwnerA adds a new device Device1 with label Device1
TeamOwnerA enables Poll Bot service for team Bots
TeamOwnerA has group conversation BotsConversation with Member1, Member2, and TeamOwnerB in team Bots
TeamOwnerA adds Poll Bot to conversation BotsConversation
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
Then I tap on conversation name BotsConversation in conversation list
And I see group conversation BotsConversation is in foreground
Then I see a banner informing me that Guests and apps are present in the conversation view
When Member1 sends message Hello fellow members to group conversation BotsConversation
Then I see the message Hello fellow members in current conversation
